description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, typical of contemporary urban architecture. The front facade includes a covered entryway with steps leading up to a wooden door, flanked by a large window and a planter box beneath. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious deck with outdoor seating and a canopy, providing ample space for relaxation or entertaining. The exterior is clad in light-colored horizontal siding, punctuated by multiple rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level featuring additional windows and access to small balconies or terraces. Greenery is integrated into the design with planters and hedges along the front and side, enhancing its curb appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, light horizontal siding, large windows, and a spacious rear deck with outdoor seating. The entryway is covered and features steps, while greenery and planters accent the exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, large window, and planter box beneath the window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal siding, symmetrical window arrangement, and a glimpse of the rear deck with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious deck, outdoor seating area with a canopy, and large windows opening onto the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, the flat roof, and the integration of greenery along the side and front.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, a wooden door, overhanging roof, and a planter box beneath a large window
